data.html_text: @Mariia Nikolaichuk I've investigated this ticket in detail but couldn't reproduce this issue (attaching a video here). I tried with 'masharumble' account on prod and even tried the exact same steps as you have shown in your video but I was able to see and use the Max button fine ('Max unavailable' button didn't appear when I tried to scan the same XAUT address to send XAUT from the tip jar). Can you test it again?
data.text: https://app.asana.com/1/45238840754660/profile/1211641185659156 I've investigated this ticket in detail but couldn't reproduce this issue (attaching a video here). I tried with 'masharumble' account on prod and even tried the exact same steps as you have shown in your video but I was able to see and use the Max button fine ('Max unavailable' button didn't appear when I tried to scan the same XAUT address to send XAUT from the tip jar). Can you test it again?

data.html_text: @Eddy WM But it works fine for me when I build and run it locally to debug it. I am sharing another screen recording I did just now where I cannot reproduce this issue when I run locally! My question is how could I debug it now? It seems to me a BE error as nothing is changed from FE in both cases!

data.html_text: I tested again on prod app just now, and looks like this issue of Max unavailable is not appearing anymore from candide/paymaster. Fee estimation works fine and Max button appears fine after I scan the QR and select XAUT from the tokens. I'm sharing a video recording of it here! @Mariia Nikolaichuk I tested with your user masharumble. So, can you test again and confirm if Max unavailable is not appearing anymore for you as well? cc: @Eddy WM
data.text:
I tested again on https://play.google.com/apps/internaltest/4700432386751456399 just now, and looks like this issue of Max unavailable is not appearing anymore from candide/paymaster. 
Fee estimation works fine and Max button appears fine after I scan the QR and select XAUT from the tokens. I'm sharing a video recording of it here!
https://app.asana.com/1/45238840754660/profile/1211641185659156 I tested with your user masharumble. So, can you test again and confirm if Max unavailable is not appearing anymore for you as well?
cc: https://app.asana.com/1/45238840754660/profile/1213406456321934
